name: Blaze It
value: Introducing "Blaze It" from Pyro High Fireworks, Product ID PH2109. This exhilarating firework, packed in a case of 24, promises a mesmerizing display of lights and crackles that will leave spectators in awe. As the fuse is ignited, "Blaze It" kicks off with an explosive burst of color. The sky is filled with 16 shots of vibrant red accompanied by dazzling white strobe effects, creating a breathtaking visual spectacle that captivates the audience. But the excitement doesn't stop there. "Blaze It" transitions seamlessly to an equally stunning sequence of red with green strobe effects, adding another dimension to the dazzling display. As each shot lights up the night sky, spectators are treated to a mesmerizing show of color and light. As the finale approaches, "Blaze It" goes out with a bang, unleashing a triple crackle finale that fills the air with an electrifying burst of sound and light. It's the perfect conclusion to a thrilling fireworks display that will leave a lasting impressio
